rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use visible identifiers from the AADL model for AGREE expressions
Write input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees when concrete bounds are provided
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq` for equation declarations and `guarantee` for guarantees
Use `and` for logical conjunction in range expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit exposure
